client.label: Client Shortname
client.description: Your client identifier in Extend Commerce. Example: MAXGAMING

warehouse_codes.label: Warehouse Codes
warehouse_codes.description: Comma-separated list of warehouse codes to sync. Leave empty to sync all. Exclude RMA/returns warehouses (e.g. MAXRMA).

requests_per_second.label: Requests Per Second
requests_per_second.description: Client-side throttle for Extend API calls. Default 4 req/s to stay below Extend's standard 5 req/s limit. Lower this if Extend marks a tenant or endpoint as low-performance.

sync_leadTime_supProducts.label: Sync Lead Time from Supplier Agreements?
sync_leadTime_supProducts.description: If set to 'true', lead times (manufacturing, transport, customs) will be imported from Extend to Optiply for supplier products.
